debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
inst✝ : Fintype V
G : SimpleGraph V
d : ℕ
hGcolorable : G.Colorable 2
hGdeg : ∀ (s : Finset V), (induce (↑s) G).edgeFinset.card ≤ d * s.card
⊢ ∃ r, Irreflexive r ∧ IsAsymm V r

proof:
by
  obtain ⟨f⟩ := hGcolorable
  exact ⟨fun u v ↦ G.Adj u v ∧ f u < f v, fun v h ↦ G.loopless v h.1, ⟨fun _ _ h1 h2 ↦ lt_asymm h1.2 h2.2⟩⟩
failed_attempts: ⟨fun _ _ ↦ False, fun _ ↦ id, ⟨fun h ↦ h.elim⟩⟩
hGcolorable.elim fun c ↦ ⟨fun v w ↦ G.Adj v w ∧ c v < c w, fun v h ↦ G.irrefl v h.1, fun h1 h2 ↦ lt_asymm h1.2 h2.2⟩
⟨fun _ _ => False, fun _ => id, ⟨fun _ _ h => h⟩⟩

by
  obtain ⟨c⟩ := hGcolorable
  exact ⟨λ v w => G.Adj v w ∧ c v < c w, ⟨λ v h => G.irrefl h.1⟩, ⟨λ h1 h2 => h1.2.not_lt h2.2⟩⟩

let ⟨c⟩ := hGcolorable
  ⟨λ u v => G.Adj u v ∧ c u < c v, ⟨λ u h => lt_irrefl (c u) h.2⟩, ⟨λ _ _ h1 h2 => lt_asymm h1.2 h2.2⟩⟩

end SimpleGraph

by
  let ⟨f⟩ := hGcolorable
  exact ⟨fun u v => G.Adj u v ∧ f u < f v, fun u h => G.irrefl u h.1, ⟨fun _ _ h => h.2.not_lt⟩⟩
⟨fun _ _ => False, fun _ h => h, ⟨fun _ _ h => h⟩⟩
hGcolorable.elim fun c _ => ⟨fun u v => G.Adj u v ∧ c u < c v, ⟨λ u h => lt_irrefl _ h.2⟩, ⟨λ u v h1 h2 => lt_asymm h1.2 h2.2⟩⟩
let ⟨c⟩ := hGcolorable; ⟨fun u v => G.Adj u v ∧ c.color u < c.color v, fun u h => G.loopless u h.1, ⟨fun _ _ h1 h2 => lt_asymm h1.2 h2.2⟩⟩

let ⟨c⟩ := hGcolorable
  ⟨λ u v ↦ G.Adj u v ∧ c.color u < c.color v, λ v h ↦ G.irrefl v h.1, λ _ _ h1 h2 ↦ h1.2.not_le h2.2⟩
⟨fun _ _ => False, fun _ h => h, ⟨fun h _ => h⟩⟩

by
  obtain ⟨c⟩ := hGcolorable
  exact ⟨λ u v ↦ G.Adj u v ∧ c u < c v, λ u h ↦ G.irrefl u h.1, ⟨λ u v h1 h2 ↦ h1.2.asymm h2.2⟩⟩

by
  obtain ⟨c⟩ := hGcolorable
  use fun u v => G.Adj u v ∧ c u < c v
  exact ⟨fun u h => G.irrefl u h.1, ⟨fun h1 h2 => lt_asymm h1.2 h2.2⟩⟩

by
  rcases hGcolorable with ⟨c⟩
  exact ⟨λ u v => G.Adj u v ∧ c u < c v, λ u h => G.irrefl u h.1, ⟨λ h1 h2 => lt_asymm h1.2 h2.2⟩⟩
⟨fun _ _ => False, fun _ h => h, ⟨fun _ _ h => h⟩⟩

by
  obtain ⟨f⟩ := hGcolorable
  use fun u v => G.Adj u v ∧ f u < f v
  exact ⟨fun u h => lt_irrefl (f u) h.2, fun u v h1 h2 => lt_asymm h1.2 h2.2⟩
hGcolorable.elim fun f => ⟨fun u v => G.Adj u v ∧ f u < f v, fun _ h => lt_irrefl _ h.2, fun _ _ h => lt_asymm h.2⟩
hGcolorable.exists_orientation_outDegree_le hGdeg
⟨λ _ _ => False, ⟨λ _ h => h⟩, ⟨λ _ _ h => h.elim⟩⟩
⟨fun _ _ => False, by intros; contradiction, by intros; contradiction⟩

by
  classical
  obtain ⟨o, _⟩ := exists_orientation_outDegree_le_of_card_edgeFinset_induce_le (fun _ ↦ d) (by simpa using hGdeg)
  exact ⟨o.r, o.is_asymm.asymm, o.is_asymm⟩

hGcolorable.elim fun f ↦ ⟨fun u v ↦ G.Adj u v ∧ f u = 0, fun _ h ↦ G.irrefl h.1,
    fun _ _ h1 h2 ↦ f.valid h1.1 (h1.2.trans h2.2.symm)⟩
⟨fun _ _ => False, fun _ => id, ⟨fun h => h.elim⟩⟩

by
  let c := hGcolorable.some
  exact ⟨λ u v => c u < c v, λ x => lt_irrefl (c x), λ u v => lt_asymm⟩

let ⟨f, _⟩ := hGcolorable
  ⟨λ u v ↦ f u < f v, λ _ ↦ irrefl _, λ _ _ ↦ asymm_of (· < ·)⟩
⟨fun _ _ => False, ⟨fun _ => id⟩, ⟨fun _ _ => id⟩⟩
⟨fun _ _ => False, ⟨fun _ h => h⟩, ⟨fun _ _ h _ => h⟩⟩
successful_attempts:

  obtain ⟨f⟩ := hGcolorable
  exact ⟨fun u v ↦ G.Adj u v ∧ f u < f v, fun v h ↦ G.loopless v h.1, ⟨fun _ _ h1 h2 ↦ lt_asymm h1.2 h2.2⟩⟩

let c := hGcolorable.some
  ⟨fun u v => G.Adj u v ∧ c u < c v, fun v h => lt_irrefl _ h.2, ⟨fun _ _ h1 h2 => lt_asymm h1.2 h2.2⟩⟩
⟨λ _ _ => False, λ _ h => h, ⟨λ _ _ h => h.elim⟩⟩

let ⟨c⟩ := hGcolorable
  ⟨λ u v ↦ G.Adj u v ∧ c u < c v, λ u h ↦ G.irrefl h.1, ⟨λ _ _ h₁ h₂ ↦ lt_asymm h₁.2 h₂.2⟩⟩

let ⟨c⟩ := hGcolorable
  ⟨λ u v => G.Adj u v ∧ c u < c v, λ u h => G.irrefl h.1, ⟨λ _ _ h₁ h₂ => h₁.2.not_lt h₂.2⟩⟩
